'members' => [ 'bytes' => [ 'shape' => 'VideoSourceBytesBlob', ], 's3Location' => [ 'shape' => 'S3Location', ], ], 'union' => true, ], 'VideoSourceBytesBlob' => [ 'type' => 'blob', 'min' => 1, ], 'WebLocation' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'url' => [ 'shape' => 'String', ], 'domain' => [ 'shape' => 'String', ], ], ], ],];
